name: Crusty Beer Bread
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Western beer - at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Grease a loaf pan and pour the batter into the prepared pan.
4. Place the loaf pan on the center rack of the oven.
5. Bake for 47 to 50 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. After about 45 minutes, remove the loaf from the oven and spread butter evenly over the top.
7. Return the loaf to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Serve with soup or stew.
